"<webfetch-citation source_id="oOG23NS4eT33mpuJUoMwV" />

## Every Friday. Game Night at Geeky Games in Burbank 8p - Board games[Hosted by Vince D.](/geeky-games-friday-night-social/events/314740465/attendees/)

## Details

We will be gathering Friday night at Geeky Games as usual 8pm, with the regular group and some new folks from Meetup.  
RSVP if you want to attend so we can reserve you a seat.  
If you are on the waitlist there isn't a seat until you to get moved to 'going. " So check Friday day before you come to the game house!

We'll be playing some fun board games - A variety of familiar trivia and party games. And some challenging new ones.  
It's $8 to get in. We start between 8 and 8:15 depending on the room. So if you are late you may have to wait for the next game to start.

Just tell Xander, Tyler, Fitz or any of the other amazing folks at the desk you are there for Vince Duvall's group. At the newly expanding location!  
They have a great selection of SNACKS including some great Brit favorites - as long as tariffs allow. No outside food though  
Snacking is definitely a part of game night.

Requests for games are always welcome - we can see if they have it in the 500+ game library. Or bring your own favorite."

There will also be free **COFFEE** and **DONUTS**!

There is a suggested donation of $5-$10, for those able, to help cover the cost of the stage and space.

This month's jam is led by **Stephen Gillikin.**

**PARKING OPTIONS**  
You can find *metered street parking (much is free & open on Sundays!)*, open *neighborhood parking* several blocks away, or there is a **parking garage** (115 N ArtsakhAve) with a driveway RIGHT NEXT to The Glendale Room. Garage parking is **free for the first 90-minutes**, and **$1 for 30 minutes** thereafter (with a day max of $9)

The Brand Summer Music Series is an outdoor concert series located at the Brand Library & Art Center. Concert attendees often bring their own chairs and picnic amenities and sit on the grassy hill. Please note that alcohol is prohibited. Performances may be experienced by children and families. The Brand Summer Music Series began in 2014 and is supported by the Glendale Arts & Culture Commission through funding from the Urban Art Program, with support from Glendale Library, Arts & Culture, Glendale Community Services & Parks, and the Brand Associates.

## 2026 SERIES SCHEDULE

All concerts are Friday nights at 7:00 PM. Admission is free.

Join us for eclectic live music outside on the lawn behind the Brand Library. Visitors are welcome to bring a chair or blanket and picnic on the grassy hillsides in Brand Park. Seats are not provided. Performances run 60 - 90 minutes without intermission.
